hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -q '\.py$'; then cd /Users/smeya/git/apple-mail-mcp && uv run ruff format --quiet "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; uv run ruff check --fix --quiet "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE 'imap\.json|\.env$'; then echo 'BLOCK: Cannot edit credential files (imap.json, .env)' && exit 1; fi
